# Qt Advanced Docking System Notice

- Upstream project: Qt Advanced Docking System
- Upstream URL: https://github.com/githubuser0xFFFF/Qt-Advanced-Docking-System
- License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later, as declared
  by every bundled upstream header; LGPL-2.1 is copied in `LICENSE.txt`
- Bundled headers: `Ksword5.1/Ksword5.1/include/ads/`
- Bundled libraries: `Ksword5.1/Ksword5.1/lib/qtadvanceddocking*`
- Runtime library: `qtadvanceddocking.dll`

The exact upstream version/commit used for the bundled headers and binaries is
not recorded in the repository. That provenance must be recovered or the
dependency must be rebuilt from a pinned upstream revision before a release can
claim a complete corresponding-source record.

Ksword dynamically links this library. Recipients must be allowed to replace
the LGPL library, and distribution must include the applicable LGPL notices and
the library's corresponding source or a compliant way to obtain it.
